name: integration_series_d_unicorn_startup_offer_review_i
method: Series D Unicorn Startup Offer Review (I will not promote)

phases.name: ingest
steps: scrape r/startups JSON API for posts tagged 'offer review', 'equity', 'series D', 'unicorn' (top 50, 7d window)
score by upvotes + comment density (proxy for validation hunger)

phases.name: extract_and_content
steps: extract data points: company stage, equity %, vesting schedule, cliff, total comp, red flags
generate 3 Twitter threads from extracted data (equity literacy angle, no company named)

phases.name: route
steps: log leads (commenters asking follow-up equity questions) to LEDGER/INBOUND_LEADS.csv
stage any novel equity structure as ALPHA_STAGING entry for product ideation
